---
title: "Start of this blog"
author: sebastianschuster
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

This is the first sentence of my personal blog. 

You might wonder, why I decided to use English on my whole website and rejected to build it multi-lingual even though German is my mothertongue. The reason is twofolded. First, I guess it would by inappropriately time consuming to build a multi-lingual website even if there are good translation tools around these days that would save me a lot of time. Second,
